{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alagaeus's staff
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] possesses a golden staff with an [[emerald]] head that contains enough power to level cities.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]]'s giant staff crashed through [[The Testament]]’s mast.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
